text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
79 
TOBA_MEDICARE_EVER 
LABEL: 
Tobacco Use Disorders First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the tobacco use disorders 
indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 
SHORT NAME: TOBA_MEDICARE_EVER
